candidate.headline: Senior Backend Engineer / Distributed Systems Engineer

roles.title: Senior Backend Engineer
core_facts: Architected and delivered Citihawks, an event-driven access-control platform for entitlements workflows, reducing manual provisioning by approximately 70 percent and improving auditability across financial systems.

Designed and maintained event-driven backend services supporting entitlements workflows on Solace and GemFire, improving system scalability and reducing operational friction across distributed financial systems.
Built and deployed production APIs on OpenShift and owned backend service contracts across microservices supporting critical financial workflows.
Implemented retry, backoff, and idempotent handling patterns to keep entitlement processing reliable under failure and replay scenarios.
Tuned hot paths in production entitlement workflows, increasing throughput and cutting request latency for downstream financial services.
Introduced AI-assisted development workflows that shortened iteration cycles and lifted engineering productivity across the backend team.
Instrumented distributed backend services with metrics, logs, and tracing, reducing incident detection time and sharpening architecture clarity across the platform.

roles.title: Manufacturing Software Engineer
core_facts: Built real-time ingestion services processing high-volume event streams from production-line equipment at a multi-billion-dollar EV manufacturing facility.
Designed monitoring and alerting for latency, throughput, and failures, reducing blind spots in production pipeline health.
Implemented backend services supporting analytics and operational decision-making on near-real-time manufacturing data.
Improved event-processing reliability and operational visibility, increasing responsiveness across production systems.

roles.title: Senior Backend Engineer
core_facts: Led migration of a legacy mortgage platform to a serverless AWS architecture on Lambda, Step Functions, and Fargate, cutting infrastructure costs by approximately 90 percent and improving scalability and deployment velocity.
Scaled backend workflows to handle thousands of concurrent users on a production financial platform.
Built Terraform infrastructure for reproducible environments, improving deployment reliability across services.
Owned backend service decomposition and cloud-native design decisions for the migrated platform.

roles.title: Senior Backend Engineer
core_facts: Architected and launched a SaaS pricing API supporting high-value financial clients and multi-million-dollar revenue streams.
Decomposed monolithic systems into Spring Boot microservices, increasing deployment frequency and improving reliability of distributed backend services.
Improved observability through logging, metrics, and automated testing, reducing production incident detection time across financial workflows.
Owned API contracts and backend service boundaries across the pricing platform.

roles.title: Contractor Software Engineer
core_facts: Maintained compliance APIs supporting hundreds of enterprise applications across the bank's distributed backend estate.
Built services in C# and Java and integrated Kafka messaging and REST APIs for event-driven backend workflows.
Supported CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and deployed services on RHEL infrastructure in production.
Diagnosed and resolved cross-application integration failures across compliance and messaging systems.

roles.title: Software Engineer
core_facts: Resolved authentication and authorization issues in backend systems supporting millions of financial accounts, strengthening entitlements and reliability.
Built analytics tracking and dashboards to capture user behavior across web platforms, improving operational visibility across the product.

roles.title: Software Engineer
core_facts: Developed a Java Spring project supporting planning and development of an AI fraud detection system processing over 5 million transactions daily from over 1 million accounts.
Handled ingestion of gigabytes of transaction data daily into the fraud detection pipeline.
Built UI and Java business logic to support client planning workflows across the fraud detection product.
Integrated a Java 6 stack with JSF/JSP front end and HBase backend for high-volume financial data.

style_rules: Do not use generic AI fluff.
Keep all claims defensible in an interview.
